page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: URSP664 or URSP688F.

Formerly: URSP688F.

URSP668 Recent Developments in Urban Studies (1-6 Credits) Examination of selected current aspects of urban affairs and planning, including, for example, new cities and towns in the United States or neighborhood preservation in other countries. Location of course may be off-campus.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.
